name: Chicken and Biscuit Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of chicken soup (14.5 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except biscuits in a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish. Mix well.
2. Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes or until hot and bubbly. Sprinkle with cheese.
3. Cut biscuits into halves and arrange in the casserole.
4. Mix sour cream, egg, celery seed, and salt to make topping; sprinkle over casserole.
5. Return to oven and continue baking 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
(from the kitchen of Carol Linkkila) From Bruce & Jill's Favourite Family Recipes Serves 4-6.
